heroDescription: AI-powered sales forecasting and inventory management built for supermarkets and pharmacies in Kurdistan.
featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Manage Your Stock
featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools to track sales, forecast demand, and optimize inventory.
howItWorksDesc: Get started in three simple steps.
step1Desc: Import your sales records as a CSV or Excel file.
step2Desc: View dashboards, trends, and product performance automatically.
step3Desc: Use AI-driven forecasts to plan inventory and avoid stockouts.
ctaTitle: Ready to Take Control of Your Inventory?
ctaDescription: Try the demo dashboard now, no signup required.
